2606.24714.title: CN-NewsTTS Bench: a target-level automatic benchmark for raw-input Chinese news TTS pronunciation
2606.24714.paper_summary: Chinese news text contains dense written forms such as scores, hyphenated model names, ranges, unit symbols, percentages, English abbreviations, and mixed Chinese-Latin-digit names. These forms are frequent in real listening workflows, and a text-to-speech (TTS) system can preserve the written string while changing the spoken meaning. We introduce CN-NewsTTS Bench v0.1, an open target-level benchmark for evaluating whether Chinese news TTS products pronounce such targets correctly from raw text, without user-side rules, LLM rewriting, SSML hints, or manual edits. The release contains a 200-record development set, an 800-record public test set, 992 public auto-evaluable targets, fixed transcripts from a three-ASR ensemble, an automatic target scorer, and initial results for seven product TTS systems. We additionally report ASR-route diagnostics, ASR-subset ablations, category-level results, confidence intervals, and provider configuration metadata. The best system reaches 0.879 strict accuracy, while several systems remain below 0.60.
2606.24714.paper_summary_zh: 中文新聞文本包含密集的書面形式，例如分數、帶連字符的模型名稱、範圍、單位符號、百分比、英語縮寫以及混合的中拉數字名稱。這些形式在實際的聆聽工作流程中很常見，而文本轉語音（TTS）系統可以在改變口語意義的同時保留書面字符串。我們介紹了 CN-NewsTTS Bench v0.1，這是一個開放的目標級基準，用於評估中文新聞 TTS 產品是否能從原始文本正確發音這些目標，而不需要用戶端規則、LLM 重寫、SSML 提示或手動編輯。該版本包含一個 200 條記錄的開發集、一個 800 條記錄的公共測試集、992 個公共自動可評估目標、來自三個 ASR 集成的固定文字稿、一個自動目標評分器，以及七個產品 TTS 系統的初步結果。我們還報告了 ASR 路徑診斷、ASR 子集消融、類別級結果、置信區間和提供者配置元數據。最佳系統達到 0.879 的嚴格準確率，而幾個系統仍低於 0.60。
2606.24714.author: Shijun Luo et.al.
